name: truestack
description: Lightweight, honesty-first coding skill set for Claude Code, fronted by an orchestrate router: language-aware backend (Express/.NET/Python), pro React frontend, root-cause debugging, quality-control, committed repo-memory, multi-agent coordination, MCP tool integrations with governance, deep research, scheduling, deploy/CI-CD/observability/database-migrations, an enforced PreToolUse governance hook, and a self-evaluation skill — plus slash commands. Tuned for solo, self-hosted work.
